entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Triticum aestivum L., the crop species under genetic analysis for leaf rolling

entities.name: LEAF ROLLING
entities.description: The phenotypic characteristic being analyzed for genetic control in wheat

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSS
entities.description: A 5 X 5 breeding design used to study parents and F1 generations

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average effect of a parent in combining with other parents to produce offspring

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The deviation of the cross mean from the expected mean based on general combining ability

entities.name: HD1976
entities.description: A wheat parent variety showing high general combining ability and high mean scores for leaf rolling

entities.name: UP245
entities.description: A wheat parent variety showing high general combining ability, high mean scores for leaf rolling, and dominant genes

entities.name: UP240
entities.description: A wheat parent variety showing high general combining ability, high mean scores for leaf rolling, and dominant genes

entities.name: RAJ 829
entities.description: A wheat parent variety possessing the most dominant genes

entities.name: DOMINANT GENES
entities.description: Genetic elements that express their phenotype even in a heterozygous state

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENETIC EFFECTS
entities.description: The cumulative effect of alleles that contribute to the determination of a trait
